@roles: Condition:vbYes = MsgBox("This Room is not Checked Out." & vbCrLf &            "Are you sure to continue?", vbYesNo + vbQuestion, "NOT CHECK OUT")

Condition:vbNo = MsgBox("Do you want to Save this Booking?", vbQuestion + vbYesNo, mstrMethod)
Condition:vbNo = MsgBox("Do you want to Check-IN this Room at " & FormatDate(dtpCheckInDate.Value) & " " & FormatTime(dtpCheckInTime.Value) & " ?", vbQuestion + vbYesNo, mstrMethod)

Condition:vbYes = MsgBox("Do you want to fully REFUND the Deposit?" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf &            "Select 'Yes' for REFUND = MYR " & Trim(txtDeposit.Text) & vbCrLf &            "Select 'No'  for REFUND = MYR " & Trim(txtRefund.Text), vbQuestion + vbYesNo, mstrMethod)

Condition:vbNo = MsgBox("REFUND = MYR " & FormatCurrency(txtRefund.Text) & vbCrLf &        "Do you want to Check-OUT this Room at " &        FormatDate(dtpCheckOutDate.Value) & " " &        FormatTime(dtpCheckOutTime.Value) & " ?", vbQuestion + vbYesNo, mstrMethod)
Condition:vbNo = MsgBox("Do you want to Check-IN this Room at " & FormatDateAndTime(Now) & " ?", vbQuestion + vbYesNo, "Check-IN")
Condition:vbYes = MsgBox("Room is not setup yet. Do you want to Setup now?", vbQuestion + vbYesNo, "Room Setup")
Condition:vbNo = MsgBox("Do you want to Save this Report?", vbQuestion + vbYesNo, mstrMethod)
Condition:vbNo = MsgBox("Do you want to Save this Room?", vbQuestion + vbYesNo, mstrMethod)
Condition:vbNo = MsgBox("Do you want to Save this Room Type?", vbQuestion + vbYesNo, mstrMethod)
Condition:vbNo = MsgBox("Do you want to Save this User?", vbQuestion + vbYesNo, mstrMethod)
